source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for exact analytics UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for headings, body, labels, dashboard figures, and compact controls.
layout: Precise data grids, silver facet dividers, restrained 8px radii, cool focus rings, and dashboard-first spacing for trust analytics workflows.

prompts.label: Transparent sapphire motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a sapphire gem motif for a Morphous design-system catalog bundle, isolated full subject, no text.
Subject: A single faceted sapphire gemstone from alluvial gravel context, deep royal blue transparent crystal body, near-black internal depth, crisp silver specular highlights on facets, premium mineral realism.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop any facet or edge; one standalone gem only.
Lighting/mood: clean trust analytics system mood, precise contrast, cool silver glints, credible gem refraction.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no ring, no jewelry setting, no pile of stones, no gravel background, no cartoon style, no text, no watermark, no decorative background.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Sapphire" derived from a faceted sapphire gem in alluvial gravel context.
Motif language: deep royal sapphire blue, near-black mineral depth, crisp silver facet highlights, subtle alluvial gravel texture, trustworthy analytics-system precision.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, dense but legible, full design-system reference.
Required visible sections: Morphous Sapphire, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, component metric cards, analytics charts, data filters, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system for trust analytics software, white and cool silver surfaces, sapphire primary actions, black ink, restrained 8px card radius, precise grid, fine borders, polished component states.
Palette callouts: Background Frost White #f7f9fc, Ink Facet Black #10131a, Primary Deep Sapphire #0f4ca8, Secondary Silver Vein #a8b2c0, Accent Ice Glint #66b8ff, Signal Gravel Slate #4a5568, Surface Blue Mist #e8f0f8, Muted Stone Silver #c6ced8, Depth Midnight Gem #071225.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no beige dominant palette, no dark-mode background, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Sapphire", keep all labels large and readable.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Sapphire". It must feel like the same trust analytics system as the light board, translated to dark mode.
Motif language: faceted sapphire gemstone from alluvial gravel, deep royal blue crystal, midnight black depth, crisp silver highlights, restrained data-system precision.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, dense but legible, full design-system reference.
Required visible sections: Morphous Sapphire, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, component metric cards, analytics charts, data filters, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system for trust analytics software, midnight gem backgrounds, silver borders, sapphire primary accents, cool blue focus rings, clear readable labels, 8px card radius, precise grid.
Palette callouts: Background Midnight Gem #071225, Foreground Frost White #f7f9fc, Card Facet Ink #10131a, Primary Silver Sapphire #66b8ff, Secondary Gravel Slate #4a5568, Accent Deep Sapphire #0f4ca8, Muted Blue Graphite #1c2a3d, Border Silver Vein #a8b2c0, Chart Ice Glint #66b8ff.
Constraints: no neon overload, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige dominant palette, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Sapphire".
